TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == Ti-ka-al śŹźŚć°Áąĺ Ti-ka-al "Tikal, ayzaay a ziday Mayaa kamu ansulitan tu Tik'al, kasumamadan hakay pangangan han tu Yax Mutal" nu ayawan nu Ke-lun-pu a ziday nu Ma-ya a macakatayay u satabakiay nialesan tu nisubelidan a tukuy. eneng niza i Kwa-ti-ma-la Pey-ten kuwanay a kilakilangan, pey-wi 17¬į13‚Ä≤19‚Ä≥ si-cin 89¬į37‚Ä≤22‚Ä≥. Ti-ka-al tini i Kwa-ti-ma-laay a Ti-ka-al aidangan nu kanatal, aitini i 1979 a mihcaan mala u nu kitakitay a niliwanan a zaysang. Ti-ka-al nanu kasumamadanay a ziday nu Ma-ya a zida nu saaicelangay a kanatak tu cacay a angangan a tukay. Ti-ka-al asakining a paya panukas katukuh kung-yen ayaw nu 4 se-ci, ciniza pakala tu kung-yen 200 a micaan katukuh tu 900 a mihcaan katukuh tu itukun. uyni a demiadan, Ma-ya cen-pang maka cen-ce, kyezay, hitay kawawan amikelec tu kitizaan nu Ma-ya, namahini ciniza atu tiniay nu tebanay anu Mey-coe-mu-si-ke-kuay a Te-aw-ti-wa-kan hatini a tukayan. tahkal t uku nisulitan tu Ti-ka-al i 4 se-ci sa macalap nu Te-aw-ti-wa-kan, ziku micidekay a ziday malepun hawsa, Ti-ka-al inayi' tu muculal ku baluhay a pikiningan a payay, matuduh tu ku luma' nu hungti. uyni a kawaw atu tademaw maladay tu makelup, 10 se-ci tu sazikuzay u nikabakah tu ku Ti-ka-al, uyni kasumamadan ziday nu macakatay a Ma-ya u tada u kapelengantu. Ti-ka-al saapuyuan tu lala' nu Ma-ya tukayay u salatakaway a tukuy, pisulitan u satenesay nu mikuwayay ciniza, katuud ku mikuwanan a tadem, pikiningan a paya, kamisama a biw atu luma' nu hungti. Ti-ka-al a ay pasu nisubelidan tu pinaay lasubu ku luma' angangan kasumamadan a nipatizeng tu luma', uyza caay kayadah ku nu ayzaay tu pina cacay a lasubu a mihcaanay pigingkiwan tu kasumamadayay makutkut. Ayza mahapinangay a nipatizeng iza ku 6 a luma' tukunay nu biw masatukal ku Cin-ce-ta. mitahaway au sulitan ku sabanguan nu saayaway nuheni. u heni i Ti-ka-al nu satalakaway a ziday misanga', pakala tu 7 se-ci tu sazikuzay katukuh 9 se-ci nu saayaway. Ti-ka-al cacay bangu kamisama biw i 740 a mihcaan katukuh 750 a mihcaan tu patizeng, pakala tu 47 adepah katalakaw. Ti-ka-al tusa bangu kamisama biw patizeng i 700 a mihcaan, pakala tu38 depah katakalaw. Ti-ka-al tulu bangu kamisama biw patizeng i 810 a mihcaan pakala tu 55 depah katakalaw, satabakiay Ti-ka-al sakasepat kamisama biw iza 70 mi ku talakaw "230 depah", ai 741 a mihcaan patizeng, nu Low-ma macakatay nu satalakaway a nisanga'an. Ti-ka-al sakalima kamisama biw i 750 a mihcaan tu malepun. Ti-ka-al sakaenem kamisama biw nipatizeng i 766 a mihcaan. i tukayay iza henay ku kasumamadan a luma' nu hungtiay a nazipaan. namahini yadah ku adidi'ay a cin-ce-ta,kung-tyan, puenengan, nitu'tu'an tu nu ba'tuay a paya , atu zuma mikawaw tu sumamaday a pimalian nu pidademecen nu Ma-ya. mahiza izahenay mikitadu tu pilubuan tu tademaw, tinizaay a sasingalan iza tu ku nu kilangay a nibalatan a kenis. Ti-ka-alay a kitizaan mueneng picalap tu lala' 60 pin-bang-kung-li, hatu caay hena kasulimet tu nikutkutan. Ti-ka-alay mataliyuk tu 6 mi kaahebal nu cilis atu masaliyuk nu cabeng. ayza iza 9 kung-li tu dada' ku namasukuliway. piasip tuyni masaliyukay tu 125 pin-bang-kung-li a lala'. ayzaay a pigingkiw maazih caay ku patalaayaw dada', mahiza iza henay ku nu zumay nu sauwacay. Ti-ka-al sa nu Ma-ya macakatay a lalangawan atu kitizaan nu tademaw. saayaway nu itiniay a pikiningan a paya patizeng i kung-yen sepat se-ci. Tukuy i Ma-ya kasumamadan a ziday-pakala tu 200 a mihcaan katukuh kung-yen tu 850 a mihcaan tu, katukuh i tu kung. Ti-ka-alay a likisi taneng panukas tu nu ayaway ayaw nu kung-yen tu 700 a mihcaan saayaway u sakatusa dada' nu tukay ciniza, saamisan atukay Mi-la-to mala angangan nu masakaputay, Ti-ka-alay hakay makay kung-yen aal-se-ci malingatu mikawaw atu Mey-cow tawyaay tabakiay a kanatal Ti-aw-ti-hwa-kan masukapah, maleku ku piala icelang ku nu uzipay a kanatal, namakayza mala u saicelangay tu nu kitakit a tukay nu Ma-ya. kung-yen 292 a mihcaan Balam Ajaw "u imi "Decorated Jaguar", namapakazaliay tu a Mey-cow-bu" micalukay Ti-ka-al hungti, malingatu tu icelang hungti ziday nu Ti-ka-al. cacay a nitu'tu'an tu tademaw niza a payaan iza ku nisulitan tu kung-yen 292 a mihca 7 a bulad 8 a demian a demiadan. uyni a demiad hina pala nu migingkiway tu likisi nu Ma-ya sumamad nu macakatayay a kalingatuan a demiad. ayzaay a likisi Ti-ka-al aidangan nu kanatal mala u satabakiay nu kasumamadan a nazipaan, sakay latuh niza caay nay kalawpes itini. Su-yen1525 a mihcaan, Si-pan-yamidemec tuHe-na.Ke-al-ti-s micaliway tu Ti-ka-al, nika caay pisakamu i tigamin. si-yen 1696 a mihcaan tu saayaw, cacay u Si-pang-ya a singkiwsey Andr√©s de Avenda√Īo mungangaw i Pey-ten kuwan a kilakilangan, u patinaku niza pibakahanhakay ci Ti-ka-al. 1848 a mihcaan ci Modesto Mendez atu ci Ambrosio Tut atademawan a nikasaupuan a ke-sye migingkiway tu kasumamadan naibatad sakaput sa tayni i Ti-ka-al, zikuz i 1853 a mihcaan u Puw-lin ke-sye-yen ku musakamuay tu nilaheci nu pigingkiw nuheni. 19 se-ci atu 20 se-ci tu saayaw, iza katuud ku mitahaway a saput tayza i Ti-ka-al migingkiw, mizunga misanga'tu abacu atu misasing. 1951 a mihcaan, i capi nu nisubelian mipatizeng misanga' tu cacbay adidi'ay a pahikukian, masumad tu nu ayaway a palawpes tu kayadah nu demiad muculil anucaan mikacaw tu apuyu'ay a sumayu, milakuit tu kilakilangan. makay 196 a mihcaan katukuh 1970 a mihcaan, Pin-si-baa-ni-ya talakaway a cacudadan i nisubelian mikawaw tu tabakiay tu mikutkutay tu kasumamadanay. 1979 a mihcaan katukuh 1983 a mihcaan, Kwa-ti-mala cenbu malingatu misabalucu' tu cacay siyang tu sapikutkut tu kasumamadan. Ti-ka-al kanatal aidangan i 1955 a mihca 5 a bulad 26 a demiad patizeng, nu Kwa-ti-ma-la nu saayaway a pidiputan. 1979 a mihcaan mala u nu lyen-he-kow-cyaw-ke-wen sakaput kitakit nikiluan tu ngangan nu nisubelian, apabinawlad. Ti-ka-al kanatal aidangan pasu tuliu a kasazuma, Ti-ka-al nisubelian, Sen. Mi-akayal,La.Pa-low-ta-ta pidiputan tu mauzipay "San Miguel La Palotada Biotop atu Ma-ya pidiputan tu mauzipay "Maya Biosphere Reserve". (San Miguel La Palotada Biotope)ŚíĆť¶¨ťõÖÁĒüÁČ©šŅĚŤ≠∑ŚćÄ . malalitin tu i hekalay atu zimaay a natinengan
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == ti-ka-ar~…ĺ *** ti-ka-ar~…ĺ "tikar~…ĺ, ajzaaj a zidaj majaa kamu ansur~…ĺitan tu tik Ē~ °ar~…ĺ, kasumamadan ńßakaj paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu ja* mutar~…ĺ" nu ajawan nu k…ô-r~…ĺun-pu a zidaj nu ma-ja a ma ¶akatajaj u satabakiaj niar~…ĺ…ôsan tu nisub…ôr~…ĺidan a tukuj. …ôn…ôŇč niza i kwa-ti-ma-r~…ĺa p…ô-t…ôn kuwanaj a kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan, p…ô-wi ********* si- ¶in *********. ti-ka-ar~…ĺ tini i kwa-ti-ma-r~…ĺaaj a ti-ka-ar~…ĺ aidaŇčan nu kanatar~…ĺ, aitini i **** a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺa u nu kitakitaj a nir~…ĺiwanan a zajsaŇč. ti-ka-ar~…ĺ nanu kasumamadanaj a zidaj nu ma-ja a zida nu saai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj a kanatak tu ¶a ¶aj a aŇčaŇčan a tukaj. ti-ka-ar~…ĺ asakiniŇč a paja panukas katukuńß kuŇč-j…ôn ajaw nu * s…ô- ¶i, ¶iniza pakar~…ĺa tu kuŇč-j…ôn *** a mi ¶aan katukuńß tu *** ¶o…ô-mu-si-k…ô-kuaj a t…ô-aw-ti-wa-kan ńßatini a tukajan. tańßkar~…ĺ t uku nisur~…ĺitan tu ti-ka-ar~…ĺ i * s…ô- ¶i sa ma ¶ar~…ĺap nu t…ô-aw-ti-wa-kan, ziku mi ¶id…ôkaj a zidaj mar~…ĺ…ôpun ńßawsa, u sat…ôn…ôsaj nu mikuwajaj ¶iniza, katuud ku mikuwanan a tad…ôm, pikiniŇčan a paja, kamisama a biw atu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu ńßuŇčti. ti-ka-ar~…ĺ a aj pasu nisub…ôr~…ĺidan tu pinaaj r~…ĺasubu ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° aŇčaŇčan kasumamadan a nipatiz…ôŇč tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, ujza ¶aaj kajadańß ku nu ajzaaj tu pina ¶a ¶aj a r~…ĺasubu a mińß ¶aanaj pigiŇčkiwan tu kasumamadajaj makutkut. ajza mańßapinaŇčaj a nipatiz…ôŇč tu * s…ô- ¶i tu sazikuzaj katukuńß * s…ô- ¶i nu saajawaj. ti-ka-ar~…ĺ ¶a ¶aj baŇču kamisama biw i *** a mińß ¶aan katukuńß *** a mińß ¶aan tu patiz…ôŇč, pakar~…ĺa tu ** ad…ôpańß katar~…ĺakaw. katakar~…ĺaw, satabakiaj ti-ka-ar~…ĺ sakas…ôpat kamisama biw iza ** mi ku tar~…ĺakaw "*** d…ôpańß", ai *** a mińß ¶aan patiz…ôŇč, nu r~…ĺow-ma ma ¶akataj nu satar~…ĺakawaj a nisaŇča Ē~ °an. ti-ka-ar~…ĺ sakar~…ĺima kamisama biw i *** a mińß ¶aan tu mar~…ĺ…ôpun. ti-ka-ar~…ĺ saka…ôn…ôm kamisama biw nipatiz…ôŇč i *** a mińß ¶aan. i tukajaj iza ńß…ônaj ku kasumamadan a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° ** pin-baŇč-kuŇč-r~…ĺi, ńßatu ¶aaj ńß…ôna kasur~…ĺim…ôt tu nikutkutan. ti-ka-ar~…ĺaj matar~…ĺijuk tu * mi kaańß…ôbar~…ĺ nu ¶ir~…ĺis atu masar~…ĺijuk nu ¶ab…ôŇč. ajza iza * kuŇč-r~…ĺi tu dada Ē~ ° ku namasukur~…ĺiwaj. piasip tujni masar~…ĺijukaj tu *** pin-baŇč-kuŇč-r~…ĺi a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °. ajzaaj a pigiŇčkiw maazińß ¶aaj ku patar~…ĺaajaw dada Ē~ °, mańßiza iza ńß…ônaj ku nu zumaj nu sauwa ¶aj. ti-ka-ar~…ĺ sa nu ma-ja ma ¶akataj a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan atu kitizaan nu tad…ômaw. saajawaj nu itiniaj a pikiniŇčan a paja patiz…ôŇč i kuŇč-j…ôn s…ôpat s…ô- ¶i. tukuj i ma-ja kasumamadan a zidaj-pakar~…ĺa tu *** a mińß ¶aan katukuńß kuŇč-j…ôn tu *** a mińß ¶aan tu, katukuńß i tu kuŇč. ti-ka-ar~…ĺaj a r~…ĺikisi tan…ôŇč panukas tu nu ajawaj ajaw nu kuŇč-j…ôn tu *** a mińß ¶aan saajawaj u sakatusa dada Ē~ ° nu tukaj ¶iniza, saamisan atukaj mi-r~…ĺa-to mar~…ĺa aŇčaŇčan nu masakaputaj, ti-ka-ar~…ĺaj ńßakaj makaj kuŇč-j…ôn aar~…ĺ-s…ô- ¶i mar~…ĺiŇčatu mikawaw atu m…ô- ¶ow tawjaaj tabakiaj a kanatar~…ĺ ti-aw-ti-ńßwa-kan masukapańß, mar~…ĺ…ôku ku piar~…ĺa i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč ku nu uzipaj a kanatar~…ĺ, namakajza mar~…ĺa u sai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj tu nu kitakit a tukaj nu ma-ja. kuŇč-j…ôn *** a mińß ¶aan bar~…ĺam ajaw "u imi "d…ô ¶orat…ôd *aguar", namapakazar~…ĺiaj tu a m…ô- ¶ow-bu" mi ¶ar~…ĺukaj ti-ka-ar~…ĺ ńßuŇčti, mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč ńßuŇčti zidaj nu ti-ka-ar~…ĺ. ¶a ¶aj a nitu Ē~ °tu Ē~ °an tu tad…ômaw niza a pajaan iza ku nisur~…ĺitan tu kuŇč-j…ôn *** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômian a d…ômiadan. ujni a d…ômiad ńßina par~…ĺa nu migiŇčkiwaj tu r~…ĺikisi nu ma-ja sumamad nu ma ¶akatajaj a kar~…ĺiŇčatuan a d…ômiad. ajzaaj a r~…ĺikisi ti-ka-ar~…ĺ aidaŇčan nu kanatar~…ĺ mar~…ĺa u satabakiaj nu kasumamadan a nazipaan, sakaj r~…ĺatuńß niza ¶aaj naj kar~…ĺawp…ôs itini. su-j…ôn**** a mińß ¶aan, si-pan-jamid…ôm…ô ¶ tuńß…ô-na.k…ô-ar~…ĺ-ti-s mi ¶ar~…ĺiwaj tu ti-ka-ar~…ĺ, nika ¶aaj pisakamu i tigamin. si-j…ôn **** a mińß ¶aan tu saajaw, ¶a ¶aj u si-paŇč-ja a siŇčkiws…ô andr*s d…ô a*…ônda*o muŇčaŇčaw i p…ô-t…ôn kuwan a kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan, u patinaku niza pibakańßanńßakaj ¶i ti-ka-ar~…ĺ. **** a mińß ¶aan ¶i mod…ôsto m…ônd…ôz atu ¶i ambrosio tut atad…ômawan a nikasaupuan a k…ô-sj…ô migiŇčkiwaj tu kasumamadan naibatad sakaput sa tajni i ti-ka-ar~…ĺ, zikuz i **** a mińß ¶aan u puw-r~…ĺin k…ô-sj…ô-j…ôn ku musakamuaj tu nir~…ĺańß…ô ¶i nu pigiŇčkiw nuńß…ôni. ** s…ô- ¶i atu ** s…ô- ¶i tu saajaw, iza katuud ku mitańßawaj a saput tajza i ti-ka-ar~…ĺ migiŇčkiw, mizuŇča misaŇča Ē~ °tu aba ¶u atu misasiŇč. **** a mińß ¶aan, i ¶api nu nisub…ôr~…ĺian mipatiz…ôŇč misaŇča Ē~ ° tu ¶a ¶baj adidi Ē~ °aj a pańßikukian, masumad tu nu ajawaj a par~…ĺawp…ôs tu kajadańß nu d…ômiad mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ anu ¶aan mika ¶aw tu apuju Ē~ °aj a sumaju, mir~…ĺakuit tu kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan. makaj *** a mińß ¶aan katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan, pin-si-baa-ni-ja tar~…ĺakawaj a ¶a ¶udadan i nisub…ôr~…ĺian mikawaw tu tabakiaj tu mikutkutaj tu kasumamadanaj. **** a mińß ¶aan katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan, kwa-ti-mar~…ĺa ¶…ônbu mar~…ĺiŇčatu misabar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° tu ¶a ¶aj sijaŇč tu sapikutkut tu kasumamadan. ti-ka-ar~…ĺ kanatar~…ĺ aidaŇčan i **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad patiz…ôŇč, nu kwa-ti-ma-r~…ĺa nu saajawaj a pidiputan. **** a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺa u nu r~…ĺj…ôn-ńß…ô-kow- ¶jaw-k…ô-w…ôn sakaput kitakit nikir~…ĺuan tu ŇčaŇčan nu nisub…ôr~…ĺian, apabinawr~…ĺad. ti-ka-ar~…ĺ kanatar~…ĺ aidaŇčan pasu tur~…ĺiu a kasazuma, ti-ka-ar~…ĺ nisub…ôr~…ĺian, s…ôn. mi-akajar~…ĺ,r~…ĺa.pa-r~…ĺow-ta-ta pidiputan tu mauzipaj "san migu…ôr~…ĺ r~…ĺa par~…ĺotada biotop atu ma-ja pidiputan tu mauzipaj "maja biospńß…ôr…ô *…ôs…ôr*…ô". (san migu…ôr~…ĺ r~…ĺa par~…ĺotada biotop…ô)******** . mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zimaaj a natin…ôŇčan
S.FORM: == kakiliman == Ti-ka-al śŹźŚć°Áąĺ Ti-ka-al "Tikal, ayzaay a ziday Mayaa kamu ansulitan tu Tik'al, kasumamadan hakay pangangan han tu Yax Mutal" nu ayawan nu Ke-lun-pu a ziday nu Ma-ya a macakatayay u satabakiay nialesan tu nisubelidan a tukuy. eneng niza i Kwa-ti-ma-la Pey-ten kuwanay a kilakilangan, pey-wi 17¬į13‚Ä≤19‚Ä≥ si-cin 89¬į37‚Ä≤22‚Ä≥. Ti-ka-al tini i Kwa-ti-ma-laay a Ti-ka-al aidangan nu kanatal, aitini i 1979 a mihcaan mala u nu kitakitay a niliwanan a zaysang. Ti-ka-al nanu kasumamadanay a ziday nu Ma-ya a zida nu saaicelangay a kanatak tu cacay a angangan a tukay. Ti-ka-al asakining a paya panukas katukuh kung-yen ayaw nu 4 se-ci, ciniza pakala tu kung-yen 200 a micaan katukuh tu 900 a mihcaan katukuh tu itukun. uyni a demiadan, Ma-ya cen-pang maka cen-ce, kyezay, hitay kawawan amikelec tu kitizaan nu Ma-ya, namahini ciniza atu tiniay nu tebanay anu Mey-coe-mu-si-ke-kuay a Te-aw-ti-wa-kan hatini a tukayan. tahkal t uku nisulitan tu Ti-ka-al i 4 se-ci sa macalap nu Te-aw-ti-wa-kan, ziku micidekay a ziday malepun hawsa, Ti-ka-al inayi' tu muculal ku baluhay a pikiningan a payay, matuduh tu ku luma' nu hungti. uyni a kawaw atu tademaw maladay tu makelup, 10 se-ci tu sazikuzay u nikabakah tu ku Ti-ka-al, uyni kasumamadan ziday nu macakatay a Ma-ya u tada u kapelengantu. Ti-ka-al saapuyuan tu lala' nu Ma-ya tukayay u salatakaway a tukuy, pisulitan u satenesay nu mikuwayay ciniza, katuud ku mikuwanan a tadem, pikiningan a paya, kamisama a biw atu luma' nu hungti. Ti-ka-al a ay pasu nisubelidan tu pinaay lasubu ku luma' angangan kasumamadan a nipatizeng tu luma', uyza caay kayadah ku nu ayzaay tu pina cacay a lasubu a mihcaanay pigingkiwan tu kasumamadayay makutkut. Ayza mahapinangay a nipatizeng iza ku 6 a luma' tukunay nu biw masatukal ku Cin-ce-ta. mitahaway au sulitan ku sabanguan nu saayaway nuheni. u heni i Ti-ka-al nu satalakaway a ziday misanga', pakala tu 7 se-ci tu sazikuzay katukuh 9 se-ci nu saayaway. Ti-ka-al cacay bangu kamisama biw i 740 a mihcaan katukuh 750 a mihcaan tu patizeng, pakala tu 47 adepah katalakaw. Ti-ka-al tusa bangu kamisama biw patizeng i 700 a mihcaan, pakala tu38 depah katakalaw. Ti-ka-al tulu bangu kamisama biw patizeng i 810 a mihcaan pakala tu 55 depah katakalaw, satabakiay Ti-ka-al sakasepat kamisama biw iza 70 mi ku talakaw "230 depah", ai 741 a mihcaan patizeng, nu Low-ma macakatay nu satalakaway a nisanga'an. Ti-ka-al sakalima kamisama biw i 750 a mihcaan tu malepun. Ti-ka-al sakaenem kamisama biw nipatizeng i 766 a mihcaan. i tukayay iza henay ku kasumamadan a luma' nu hungtiay a nazipaan. namahini yadah ku adidi'ay a cin-ce-ta,kung-tyan, puenengan, nitu'tu'an tu nu ba'tuay a paya , atu zuma mikawaw tu sumamaday a pimalian nu pidademecen nu Ma-ya. mahiza izahenay mikitadu tu pilubuan tu tademaw, tinizaay a sasingalan iza tu ku nu kilangay a nibalatan a kenis. Ti-ka-alay a kitizaan mueneng picalap tu lala' 60 pin-bang-kung-li, hatu caay hena kasulimet tu nikutkutan. Ti-ka-alay mataliyuk tu 6 mi kaahebal nu cilis atu masaliyuk nu cabeng. ayza iza 9 kung-li tu dada' ku namasukuliway. piasip tuyni masaliyukay tu 125 pin-bang-kung-li a lala'. ayzaay a pigingkiw maazih caay ku patalaayaw dada', mahiza iza henay ku nu zumay nu sauwacay. Ti-ka-al sa nu Ma-ya macakatay a lalangawan atu kitizaan nu tademaw. saayaway nu itiniay a pikiningan a paya patizeng i kung-yen sepat se-ci. Tukuy i Ma-ya kasumamadan a ziday-pakala tu 200 a mihcaan katukuh kung-yen tu 850 a mihcaan tu, katukuh i tu kung. Ti-ka-alay a likisi taneng panukas tu nu ayaway ayaw nu kung-yen tu 700 a mihcaan saayaway u sakatusa dada' nu tukay ciniza, saamisan atukay Mi-la-to mala angangan nu masakaputay, Ti-ka-alay hakay makay kung-yen aal-se-ci malingatu mikawaw atu Mey-cow tawyaay tabakiay a kanatal Ti-aw-ti-hwa-kan masukapah, maleku ku piala icelang ku nu uzipay a kanatal, namakayza mala u saicelangay tu nu kitakit a tukay nu Ma-ya. kung-yen 292 a mihcaan Balam Ajaw "u imi "Decorated Jaguar", namapakazaliay tu a Mey-cow-bu" micalukay Ti-ka-al hungti, malingatu tu icelang hungti ziday nu Ti-ka-al. cacay a nitu'tu'an tu tademaw niza a payaan iza ku nisulitan tu kung-yen 292 a mihca 7 a bulad 8 a demian a demiadan. uyni a demiad hina pala nu migingkiway tu likisi nu Ma-ya sumamad nu macakatayay a kalingatuan a demiad. ayzaay a likisi Ti-ka-al aidangan nu kanatal mala u satabakiay nu kasumamadan a nazipaan, sakay latuh niza caay nay kalawpes itini. Su-yen1525 a mihcaan, Si-pan-yamidemec tuHe-na.Ke-al-ti-s micaliway tu Ti-ka-al, nika caay pisakamu i tigamin. si-yen 1696 a mihcaan tu saayaw, cacay u Si-pang-ya a singkiwsey Andr√©s de Avenda√Īo mungangaw i Pey-ten kuwan a kilakilangan, u patinaku niza pibakahanhakay ci Ti-ka-al. 1848 a mihcaan ci Modesto Mendez atu ci Ambrosio Tut atademawan a nikasaupuan a ke-sye migingkiway tu kasumamadan naibatad sakaput sa tayni i Ti-ka-al, zikuz i 1853 a mihcaan u Puw-lin ke-sye-yen ku musakamuay tu nilaheci nu pigingkiw nuheni. 19 se-ci atu 20 se-ci tu saayaw, iza katuud ku mitahaway a saput tayza i Ti-ka-al migingkiw, mizunga misanga'tu abacu atu misasing. 1951 a mihcaan, i capi nu nisubelian mipatizeng misanga' tu cacbay adidi'ay a pahikukian, masumad tu nu ayaway a palawpes tu kayadah nu demiad muculil anucaan mikacaw tu apuyu'ay a sumayu, milakuit tu kilakilangan. makay 196 a mihcaan katukuh 1970 a mihcaan, Pin-si-baa-ni-ya talakaway a cacudadan i nisubelian mikawaw tu tabakiay tu mikutkutay tu kasumamadanay. 1979 a mihcaan katukuh 1983 a mihcaan, Kwa-ti-mala cenbu malingatu misabalucu' tu cacay siyang tu sapikutkut tu kasumamadan. Ti-ka-al kanatal aidangan i 1955 a mihca 5 a bulad 26 a demiad patizeng, nu Kwa-ti-ma-la nu saayaway a pidiputan. 1979 a mihcaan mala u nu lyen-he-kow-cyaw-ke-wen sakaput kitakit nikiluan tu ngangan nu nisubelian, apabinawlad. Ti-ka-al kanatal aidangan pasu tuliu a kasazuma, Ti-ka-al nisubelian, Sen. Mi-akayal,La.Pa-low-ta-ta pidiputan tu mauzipay "San Miguel La Palotada Biotop atu Ma-ya pidiputan tu mauzipay "Maya Biosphere Reserve". (San Miguel La Palotada Biotope)ŚíĆť¶¨ťõÖÁĒüÁČ©šŅĚŤ≠∑ŚćÄ . malalitin tu i hekalay atu zimaay a natinengan
